name: Batch Input Monitoring
description: Monitor and manage batch input sessions used for data migration and mass data entry.
when_to_use: Monitor data migration sessions, analyze failed batch input sessions, replay sessions.

name: Schedule Background Job
description: Create and schedule background jobs with programs, variants, and start conditions.
when_to_use: Schedule periodic reports, data processing, interface programs, housekeeping tasks.
steps: Enter job name and job class
Add step with program name and variant
Set start condition (immediate, time, or event)

name: Overview of job selection
description: Monitor all background jobs with filtering by name, user, status, and date range.
when_to_use: Monitor running jobs, analyze failures, view execution logs, cancel stuck jobs, reschedule.
steps: Enter filter criteria (user, job name, status, date)
Select job to view log or details

name: Job Analysis
description: Detailed analysis of background job execution performance and statistics.
when_to_use: Performance tuning of batch jobs, diagnosing slow or failing jobs.
steps: Select job or time range to analyze

name: Execute external OS commands
description: Execute OS commands defined in SXPGCOTAB from within SAP.
when_to_use: Run OS-level scripts from within SAP, check file system, verify OS parameters.

name: Event History and Background Events
description: Define SAP job events for event-driven background job scheduling.
when_to_use: Configure events that trigger background jobs, implement job chain dependencies.

name: Manage Background Processing Events
description: Manually trigger batch events to start event-dependent background jobs.
when_to_use: Manually trigger event-driven jobs during testing or when automated trigger fails.
steps: Verify dependent jobs start in SM37

name: Background Processing Analysis Tool
description: Analyze background processing configuration and performance comprehensively.
when_to_use: Diagnose background processing issues, analyze batch processing performance.

name: Maintain External OS Commands
description: Display and maintain external OS command definitions for use in SM49.
when_to_use: Define allowed OS-level commands callable from SAP system.

name: Client Copy
description: Comprehensive client copy supporting all copy types with various profiles.
when_to_use: Full client copy including application data, configuration, and users.

name: Client Copy-Special Sel (Deprecated)
description: Client copy with special selection options for targeted data copying.
when_to_use: Copy specific transport requests or selected data between clients.

name: Client Transport
description: Transport client-specific data using transport requests.
when_to_use: Move client-specific configuration via transport system.

name: Client Copy Log
description: Monitor and review logs from client copy operations.
when_to_use: Monitor running copies, troubleshoot failures, review history.

name: Client Administration
description: Central client management. Create, configure, delete SAP clients and set restrictions.
when_to_use: Create test clients, configure settings, restrict changes in productive clients.

name: Delete Client (discontinued)
description: Delete an SAP client and all its data. Irreversible operation requiring authorization.
when_to_use: Remove obsolete test clients, clean up sandbox environments, free database space.

name: Client Import
description: Import client data from a transport file into the target system.
when_to_use: Import client data exported from another system.

name: t Import Methods (discontinued)
description: Post-processing steps required after a client import or system copy.
when_to_use: Complete client migration, fix system-specific settings after copy.

name: Client Export (discontinued)
description: Export client data to transport files for cross-system client copy.
when_to_use: Copy client between systems, migrate configuration to new landscape.
steps: Import via STMS in target system followed by SCC7

name: Remote Client Copy (discontinued)
description: Client copy directly between two SAP systems via RFC connection.
when_to_use: Copy clients between systems when direct RFC connection is available.
steps: Select source client and copy profile

name: Local Client Copy (discontinued)
description: Perform local client copy within the same SAP system.
when_to_use: Create test clients as copies of productive data, clone configuration.

name: Add-On Version Information
description: Display version information for all installed SAP add-ons and components.
when_to_use: Check installed add-on versions, verify component status.
steps: Check version details and patch level

name: Add-On Installation Tool
description: Install SAP add-ons, industry solutions, and complementary software components.
when_to_use: Install SAP add-ons, apply add-on patch levels, manage installed component versions.

name: SAP Load Generator
description: Generate ABAP programs into main memory for improved performance.
when_to_use: Post-upgrade performance improvement, pre-load critical programs.
steps: Select packages or programs to generate

name: Note Assistant
description: Apply SAP Notes correction instructions directly to the system.
when_to_use: Apply SAP correction notes, fix reported bugs, implement security notes at code level.
steps: Enter SAP Note number or download from portal

name: Support Package Manager
description: Install SAP Support Packages and Enhancement Packages. Primary patching and maintenance tool.
when_to_use: Apply monthly security patches, install feature packages, upgrade enhancement packages.
steps: Upload support package files to transport directory

name: Spool and related areas
description: Central menu for all spool-related transactions and functions.
when_to_use: Navigate to spool administration functions from one central menu.

name: Output Controller
description: Monitor and manage all spool requests. View, print, delete, and forward output requests.
when_to_use: Resend stuck print jobs, check print status, delete old spool requests, change output device.
steps: Set filter criteria by user, date, or device
Select request and choose action from menu

name: Display Spool Requests
description: View and manage spool requests created by the currently logged-in user.
when_to_use: Check status of your own print jobs, reprint documents, download output.

name: Spool Load Formats
description: Manage and load spool format definitions for output formatting.
when_to_use: Configure output formats for printer and spool management.

name: TemSe Directory
description: View and manage TemSe object directory used by the spool system.
when_to_use: Clean up TemSe objects, diagnose spool storage issues, recover lost output.

name: TemSe Administration
description: Administer TemSe storage including consistency checks and reorganization.
when_to_use: Spool system maintenance, fix TemSe inconsistencies, configure storage backend.

name: Spool Administration
description: Administer SAP spool system components: output devices, device types, and access methods.
when_to_use: Add and configure printers, set up device types, manage access methods, assign spool servers.

name: Spool Consistency Check
description: Check consistency of the spool system and identify any inconsistencies.
when_to_use: Regular spool health checks, diagnose spool problems, pre-maintenance checks.

name: Spool Installation Check
description: Check spool system installation and configuration for correctness.
when_to_use: Post-installation verification, spool configuration validation.

name: Synchronize All Buffers
description: Synchronize all SAP buffers except the program buffer.
when_to_use: Force buffer synchronization after configuration changes.

name: Refresh Table Buffers
description: System command to refresh the table buffer immediately without restart.
when_to_use: Force table buffer refresh after direct table changes.

name: Display SAP Directories
description: View SAP directory structure and files accessible from the application server.
when_to_use: Check trace files, verify transport directory contents, access SAP logs and configuration files.
steps: Select file to view or download

name: Logon to Online Service System
description: Direct logon to SAP OSS for support notes and license downloads.
when_to_use: Access SAP Support Portal, download licenses, create support messages.

name: Data Migration Logging
description: Log and monitor data migration activities.
when_to_use: Track data migration progress and errors.

name: Maintain SAP Instances
description: Maintain SAP instance configuration and operation mode settings.
when_to_use: Configure instance-specific settings, manage operation modes.

name: Maintain Profile Parameters
description: Maintain SAP instance, default, and start profile parameters. Requires restart for most changes.
when_to_use: Modify memory parameters, work process counts, buffer sizes, logon restrictions.

name: Profile Parameter Maintenance
description: Display documentation for SAP profile parameters including allowed values and defaults.
when_to_use: Research parameter impact before changing, verify behavior.
steps: Check current value and recommended range

name: Maintain RFC Server Group Assignment
description: Maintain RFC server group assignments for load balancing of RFC workload.
when_to_use: Configure RFC server groups, assign servers for RFC load distribution.

name: Menu Administration
description: Easy access menu for common system administration tasks.
when_to_use: Quick navigation for system administrators to common TCodes.

name: ABAP Reporting
description: Execute ABAP reports and programs directly.
when_to_use: Run SAP standard reports, execute utility programs, run custom reports.

name: Archive Administration
description: Manage SAP data archiving. Define archiving objects and schedule archive runs.
when_to_use: Archive old data to reduce database size, compliance requirements.

name: SAP Business Workplace
description: SAP Business Workplace for workflow messages, work items, and internal mail.
when_to_use: Access workflow work items, view and process business tasks.

name: SAPconnect - Administration
description: Administer SAPConnect for email SMTP and fax communication.
when_to_use: Configure SAP email sending, manage communication nodes, diagnose mail failures.

name: Installation Check
description: Comprehensive installation check verifying all system configurations and profile parameters.
when_to_use: Post-installation validation, after upgrades, regular health checks.

name: Lock Transactions
description: Lock or unlock SAP transaction codes system-wide preventing user access.
when_to_use: Temporarily disable TCodes during maintenance, restrict sensitive transactions.

name: System Messages
description: Create broadcast messages displayed to all logged-in users in the SAP status bar.
when_to_use: Notify users about downtime, maintenance windows, go-live freezes, urgent alerts.
steps: Enter message text and validity period

name: Logons to an AS Instance
description: All users logged on to the current application server including session, client, terminal details.
when_to_use: Monitor active sessions, notify users before shutdown, terminate idle sessions.

name: system log
description: Central SAP system log viewer. Records all critical events, errors, warnings, kernel messages.
when_to_use: First transaction to check for any system issue. Diagnose startup failures, kernel errors, RFC issues.
steps: Select log types or choose All

name: System Log Analysis
description: Advanced analysis of system log data with pattern matching and filtering.
when_to_use: Deep analysis of system log patterns, recurring error identification.

name: Installation Check
description: SAP installation check verifying system consistency.
when_to_use: Post-installation validation, after upgrades.

name: Model Transfer for Tables
description: Transfer table model data between clients or systems.
when_to_use: Copy configuration or table models across clients.

name: Background control objects monitor
description: Monitor and control background processing.
when_to_use: Overview of background processing status.

name: Display/Maintain Operating Mode Sets
description: Define and manage SAP operation modes controlling work process distribution.
when_to_use: Optimize work process allocation for day vs night processing.

name: Session Manager Menu Tree Display
description: Display a dynamic user menu based on role authorizations.
when_to_use: Quick navigation to assigned transactions, alternative to standard menu.

name: Maint.Assign. Logon Grp to Instance
description: Configure logon groups to distribute user connections across application servers.
when_to_use: Load balancing, define server groups for user types, set up message server logon.

name: Language Import Utility
description: Import SAP language packages into the system for multilingual support.
when_to_use: Add new language support, update language translations.

name: Language Management
description: Transport SAP language packages between systems.
when_to_use: Move language support between landscape systems.

name: Message Server Monitor
description: Monitor SAP message server coordinating communication between application server instances.
when_to_use: Verify message server health, check instance registration, diagnose communication issues.

name: SAP Enhancement Management
description: Manage SAP customer exits. Older enhancement framework before BAdIs.
when_to_use: Implement customer exits for standard SAP programs without modifying SAP source.

name: Trusted-Trusting Connections
description: Configure trusted system relationships for single sign-on between SAP systems.
when_to_use: Set up trusted RFC connections, configure SSO between SAP systems.

name: Trusted-Trusting Connections
description: Display and maintain trusting system configurations.
when_to_use: Manage trusting relationships for SSO and RFC connections.

name: SAP Web Repository
description: Manage SAP Web Repository containing BSP applications and web content.
when_to_use: Manage web-based content and BSP application resources.

name: Display Own Jobs
description: Display background jobs submitted by the current user.
when_to_use: Check status of your own submitted background jobs quickly.

name: Number Range Object
description: Define and manage number range objects for SAP document numbering.
when_to_use: Configure number ranges for custom objects, check number range status.

name: SAPconnect Send Requests
description: Monitor outgoing SAPConnect messages. Check email and fax delivery status.
when_to_use: Check sent email status, retry failed messages.

name: Display Modified DE Objects
description: Adjust modified SAP repository objects after an upgrade.
when_to_use: Post-upgrade mandatory step, adjust modified programs, function modules, and classes.
steps: Review list of objects to adjust
Decide for each: accept SAP version or keep modification

name: Display Modified DDIC Objects
description: Adjust modified ABAP Dictionary objects after an upgrade.
when_to_use: Post-upgrade mandatory step, adjust modified tables, structures, and domains.

name: System Administration Assistant
description: Guided system administration checklists for common daily activities.
when_to_use: Guided daily administration, onboarding new administrators.

name: Trust Manager
description: Manage SSL certificates and trust relationships for secure communication.
when_to_use: Configure HTTPS connections, manage certificates for cloud integration.

name: Check Transport Requests
description: Check transport requests and consistency.

name: Download file
description: Download files from SAP application server to local PC.
when_to_use: Download transport logs, trace files, retrieve server files.
steps: Enter source file path on server

name: Upload file
description: Upload files from local PC to SAP application server directory.
when_to_use: Upload transport files, data files, certificates.

name: Transport Organizer (Extended)
description: Extended Transport Organizer with advanced filtering. Shows all transport requests and tasks.
when_to_use: Manage requests across all users and systems, release requests, track transport history.
steps: Set filters for user, category, date, status

name: Environment Analyzer
description: Analyze SAP system environment for transport and development dependencies.
when_to_use: Analyze dependencies before transporting, check object usage across requests.

name: Transport Organizer Tools
description: Advanced tools including object search, lock analysis, and request manipulation.
when_to_use: Search objects in transports, unlock stuck objects, analyze transport conflicts.
steps: Search by object name or request

name: Set Up Transport Organizer
description: Configure and set up the SAP Workbench Organizer for development management.
when_to_use: Initial system setup, configure change and transport system settings.

name: CTS Status Display
description: Display the status of the Change and Transport System and its components.
when_to_use: Check CTS health, verify transport system status, review system change options.

name: Transport Organizer
description: Manage Workbench transport requests containing ABAP development objects.
when_to_use: Release development transports, check object locks, manage developer tasks.

name: Transport Organizer
description: Manage Customizing transport requests containing IMG configuration settings and table entries.
when_to_use: Release configuration transports, organize customizing changes, manage requests from SPRO.
steps: Import via STMS in target system

name: Transport Management System
description: Central SAP Transport Management System. Configure landscape, import queues, manage requests.
when_to_use: Import transports DEV to QAS to PRD, manage routes, configure domain controller, monitor imports.
steps: Navigate to Transport Routes or Import Overview

name: Role Maintenance
description: Create and maintain SAP authorization roles with menus, transactions, and authorization objects.
when_to_use: Create new roles, add TCodes to roles, maintain authorization values, generate profiles.
steps: Enter role name to create or modify
Maintain Menu tab to add TCodes
Maintain Authorizations tab with field values

name: User Master Data Reconciliation
description: Synchronize user master records with role assignments after changes.
when_to_use: After role changes to ensure assignments are active and buffers refreshed.

name: Central User Administration
description: Central User Administration configuration for user synchronization across systems.
when_to_use: Set up CUA for centralized user management across system landscape.

name: Transfer Users
description: Display Central User Administration structure showing connected systems.
when_to_use: Review CUA landscape structure, verify connected systems.

name: Central User Administration Log
description: View Central User Administration log entries.
when_to_use: Audit CUA distribution activities, diagnose CUA issues.
steps: Filter by date or event type

name: Central User Administration
description: Configure which user master fields are managed centrally vs locally in CUA.
when_to_use: Configure CUA field management, decide which fields sync centrally.
steps: Configure central or local control per field

name: Configure Security Audit Log
description: Configure the SAP Security Audit Log parameters.
when_to_use: Enable audit logging for compliance, configure security event tracking.

name: Evaluate Security Audit Log
description: Display the security audit log showing recorded security-relevant events.
when_to_use: Security investigations, compliance reporting, audit evidence collection.
steps: Set filter for time range and event type

name: User Maintenance
description: Create, modify, and manage SAP user master records. Set passwords, assign roles, configure restrictions.
when_to_use: Create users, reset passwords, assign authorizations, lock or unlock users, set validity dates.
steps: Choose action: Create, Change, or Display
Maintain Logon Data, Address, Roles tabs

name: User Display
description: Display-only access to user master records without modification risk.
when_to_use: Audit user configurations, check role assignments, review logon restrictions for compliance.
steps: Review all tabs in display-only mode

name: Maintain Authorization Profiles
description: Create and maintain authorization profiles directly. Older method - prefer PFCG for role-based approach.
when_to_use: View existing profiles, create simple profiles, analyze profile content.

name: Maintain Authorizations
description: Create and maintain SAP authorization objects and their field values.
when_to_use: Create custom authorization objects, maintain authorization values.

name: Maintain Internet Users
description: Maintain internet users for SAP Web applications and portals.
when_to_use: Manage portal and web application user accounts.

name: User Mass Maintenance
description: Mass changes to multiple user accounts simultaneously.
when_to_use: End-of-project user lockout, mass role assignment, bulk password reset.
steps: Apply change to all selected users

name: Authorization Default Data (Cust.)
description: Maintain mapping between transactions and authorization objects they check.
when_to_use: Review what authorizations a TCode checks, adjust entries for custom TCodes.

name: Upgrade Tool for Profile Generator
description: Update authorization proposals after SAP upgrades.
when_to_use: Post-upgrade role maintenance, ensure proposals reflect latest SAP recommendations.

name: Evaluate Authorization Check
description: Display the authorization check that failed for current or another user.
when_to_use: Diagnose authorization errors reported by users, identify missing authorizations.
steps: Enter SU53 in user session to see their last failed check
Add missing authorization to role via PFCG

name: Analyze User Buffer
description: Display and analyze the authorization buffer for a specific user.
when_to_use: Debug complex authorization issues, verify authorizations are active.

name: User Information System
description: Comprehensive reporting for SAP users and authorizations. Query by role, object, or transaction.
when_to_use: Audit user access, compliance reporting, find who has specific access.

name: Role Profiles
description: Generate and update authorization profiles for roles in mass.
when_to_use: Mass profile generation after role changes, ensure all user buffers updated.

name: Asynchronous RFC Monitor
description: Monitor asynchronous RFC queue and status of async RFC calls.
when_to_use: Check failed asynchronous RFC calls, monitor aRFC queue.

name: Display and Delete Locks
description: Display and delete lock entries in the SAP enqueue server lock table.
when_to_use: Remove orphaned locks preventing users from editing records, diagnose lock conflicts.
steps: Filter by table name or user

name: Administrate Update Records
description: Monitor SAP update records for asynchronous database updates.
when_to_use: Find failed updates, monitor throughput, investigate data inconsistencies.
steps: Select time range and status filter

name: Update Program Administration
description: Manage the SAP update service. Activate or deactivate update processing.
when_to_use: Disable updates before critical maintenance, re-enable after, diagnose mass update failures.

name: Queue Maintenance Transaction
description: Maintain queues used for qRFC and queue-based processing.
when_to_use: Manage processing queues, diagnose stuck queue entries.

name: Work Processes of AS Instance
description: All work processes on the current application server. Shows type, status, user, program, and runtime.
when_to_use: Identify stuck processes, diagnose performance, find PRIV mode, cancel hung processes.
steps: Look for PRIV or STOPPED state

name: Started AS Instances
description: All active SAP application server instances in the system landscape.
when_to_use: Verify all instances running, check load distribution, navigate to instance-specific monitors.
steps: Navigate to SM50 of specific instance

name: TXCOM Maintenance
description: Maintain TXCOM table for transaction processing configuration.
when_to_use: Configure transaction processing parameters.

name: THOST Maintenance
description: Maintain THOST table for host configuration.
when_to_use: Configure host-related system settings.

name: Number Range Buffer
description: Display and manage the number range buffer in memory.
when_to_use: Diagnose number range issues, reset buffer, verify buffer status.

name: Borrow and Return Objects
description: Manage object borrowing and return in transport system contexts.
when_to_use: Handle object lock management in development scenarios.

name: Global Work Process Overview
description: All work processes across all application servers in one consolidated view.
when_to_use: System-wide performance issues, rolling upgrade monitoring, landscape-wide visibility.
steps: View all work processes across all instances

name: Job Scheduling
description: Advanced job scheduling administration.
when_to_use: Configure complex job scheduling scenarios.

name: Job Administration
description: Advanced background job administration at system level.
when_to_use: Manage background job administration.

name: ABAP Call Monitor: Administration
description: ABAP Call Monitor administration for usage analysis.

name: Application Hierarchy Maintenance
description: Display and maintain the internal application component hierarchy.
when_to_use: Understand component structure, assign components to objects.

name: Display Icons
description: Display all available SAP icons and their technical names.
when_to_use: Find icon names for ABAP program development.

name: View/Table Comparison
description: Compare contents of views or tables between systems or clients.
when_to_use: Compare configuration between systems, identify differences.

name: Customizing Cross-System Viewer
description: Comprehensive table analysis and comparison tool.
when_to_use: Analyze table contents, compare between clients.

name: Table Comparison Export to Tape
description: Export table comparison data for archiving.
when_to_use: Archive table comparison results.

name: Table Comparison Against Tape

when_to_use: Verify table consistency against archived baseline.

name: Table History
description: View change history for configuration table entries.
when_to_use: Audit configuration changes, track who changed what and when.

name: Data Modeler
description: SAP Data Modeler for designing and maintaining data models.
when_to_use: Design data structures, create entity-relationship models.

description: ABAP Data Dictionary for defining and managing database tables, views, structures, data elements, and domains.

name: ABAP Repository Information System

name: Data Browser

when_to_use: Check table contents, verify configuration, debug production data issues.

name: General Table Display
description: Generate a table display program for a specific database table.
when_to_use: Create quick table display programs.

when_to_use: Develop custom classes, create interfaces, maintain class hierarchies.

name: ABAP Objects Runtime Analysis

when_to_use: Performance profiling of ABAP programs, identify runtime bottlenecks.

name: ABAP Text Element Maintenance

when_to_use: Add or modify text elements for custom programs.

description: Maintain standards and translations for ABAP objects.

description: Maintain SAP area menus for application navigation.

name: Parameterized Screen Painter

description: ABAP-specific repository information system search.

when_to_use: Monitor active database operations, track long-running operations.

Use SQL Command for direct query execution

name: Database Connection Maintenance

when_to_use: Configure connections for custom database access, secondary DB connections.

name: LAN check with ping

name: Operating System Command
description: Execute OS commands from within SAP for system checks.
when_to_use: Run OS commands, file operations from within SAP.

name: System Trace
description: Activate and analyze system traces including authorization, kernel, and database traces.
when_to_use: Trace authorization failures, kernel issues, database access patterns.

name: Setups/Tune Buffers
description: Overview of all SAP memory buffer utilization including pools, extended memory, and caches.
when_to_use: Memory tuning, identify buffer overflow, optimize memory parameters.

name: Workload and Performance Statistics
description: SAP workload statistics and comprehensive performance reporting across time periods.

name: DB Performance Monitor
description: Detailed database performance including hit ratios, SQL statistics, and wait events.

name: Performance Trace
description: Activate and analyze SQL, RFC, Enqueue, and HTTP performance traces for SAP programs.
when_to_use: Trace slow programs to identify SQL bottlenecks, analyze database access patterns.
steps: Click Activate Trace for required trace types
Run the program or transaction to trace
Return to ST05 and Deactivate Trace
Display trace and analyze SQL statements by runtime

name: Operating System Monitor
description: Monitor OS resources including CPU, memory, disk I/O, and paging activity.
when_to_use: System resource monitoring, identify CPU or memory bottlenecks, capacity planning.
steps: Navigate to history for trend analysis

name: Application monitor
description: Monitor SAP application performance metrics by module and user activity.
when_to_use: Identify which applications consume most resources, capacity planning.

name: Network Monitor
description: Monitor SAP network performance and connectivity metrics.
when_to_use: Diagnose network-related performance issues, monitor network latency.

name: Network Alert Monitor
description: Monitor network alerts and performance warnings.
when_to_use: Respond to network alerts, monitor network health.

name: Table Call Statistics
description: Analyze how often SAP tables are accessed and what operations are performed.
when_to_use: Identify hot tables requiring buffering, optimize buffer settings.
steps: Adjust table buffering settings in SE13

name: Single transaction analysis
description: Detailed runtime analysis (profiling) of ABAP programs identifying bottleneck statements.
when_to_use: Performance tuning of custom programs, identify bottleneck statements.
steps: Configure trace for target user or program
Execute target program while trace is active
Return to ST12 and display trace results

name: Application Analysis
description: Comprehensive application analysis and performance reporting.
when_to_use: Deep application performance analysis, identify problematic programs.

name: Create Industry Short Texts

name: Application Log: Display Logs

View trace file contents in browser

Review error message and short text
Analyze stack trace and variable values
Check source code at point of failure

name: System Landscape
description: Maintain Solution Manager System Landscape defining systems, components, and roles.

name: SolMan CRM WebClient
description: Direct access to CRM WebClient UI for ITSM and Change Request Management.

steps: Process ITSM tickets or change requests

name: SM Work Center
description: Access Solution Manager Work Center for navigating different functional areas.

name: Solution Manager Project Analysis
description: Project Analysis and Reporting in Solution Manager.
when_to_use: Analyze project progress, generate project reports.

name: Solution Manager Project Admin
description: Project Administration for setting up projects and defining scope in Solution Manager.

name: Solution Manager Operations
description: Solution Manager Operations for monitoring and managing the SAP landscape.
when_to_use: Monitor managed system landscape, manage operations scenarios.

name: Solution Manager Setup
description: Central guided configuration wizard for Solution Manager initial setup and ongoing maintenance.

steps: Configure technical connections to managed systems

name: SolMan Work Center Functional
description: Solution Manager Work Center for functional users to access scenarios and work areas.

name: Solution Documentation
description: Primary transaction to manage documentation, business processes, and configurations in SolMan.
when_to_use: Manage solution documentation, maintain business process documentation.

name: Test Plan Management
description: Manage test plans in Solution Manager Test Workbench.

name: Tester worklist
